name: PopoverComponent
description:
The popover is a wrapping component that accepts a *control* as well as a *body*.
The control is what will trigger the opening of the actual popover, which is called the body.
By default, popovers are triggered by click. This can be customized through the *triggers* input.

inputs.name: additionalBodyClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS class for the popover body container

inputs.name: additionalTriggerClass
inputs.description: Additional CSS class for the popover trigger element

inputs.name: appendTo
inputs.description: The element to which the overlay is attached. By default it is body

inputs.name: applyOverlay
inputs.description: Whether to apply a background overlay

inputs.name: bodyAriaLabel
inputs.description: ARIA label for the popover body

inputs.name: bodyAriaLabelledBy
inputs.description:
ID of the element that labels the popover body. Alternative to
[bodyAriaLabel] when the label already exists in the DOM (e.g. the
trigger's text). Sets aria-labelledby on the popover body.

inputs.name: bodyRole
inputs.description:
ARIA role for the popover body. Default: 'dialog' (back-compat).

When 'dialog', WCAG requires an accessible name — provide one via
[bodyAriaLabel] or [bodyAriaLabelledBy]. Without a name, axe-core
raises aria-dialog-name violations.

Set to null when the popover is a non-modal disclosure widget and
the trigger's aria-haspopup already carries the relationship (no role
attribute is rendered). Other valid values: 'region', 'menu', 'listbox',
'tooltip', 'alertdialog' — match the role to the popover's actual semantics.
Any valid ARIA role is accepted; the type provides autocomplete for common cases.

inputs.name: cdkPositions
inputs.description: List of position options for CDK overlay

inputs.name: closeOnEscapeKey
inputs.description: Whether escape key should close the popover

inputs.name: closeOnNavigation
inputs.description: Whether to close the popover on router navigation start

inputs.name: closeOnOutsideClick
inputs.description: Whether clicking outside popover should close it

inputs.name: config
inputs.description:
Configuration object for popover settings.
When provided, these settings will be merged with individual input properties.
Individual inputs take precedence over config object values.

inputs.name: disableScrollbar
inputs.description: Whether scrollbar should be disabled

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the popover is disabled

inputs.name: fillControlMode
inputs.description:
Preset options for the popover body width.
* `at-least` will apply a minimum width to the body equivalent to the width of the control.
* `equal` will apply a width to the body equivalent to the width of the control.
* Leave blank for no effect.

inputs.name: fixedPosition
inputs.description: Whether position shouldn't change when popover approaches the corner of page

inputs.name: focusAutoCapture
inputs.description: Whether focus should be automatically captured when popover opens

inputs.name: focusTrapped
inputs.description: Whether the popover should trap focus

inputs.name: id
inputs.description: Id of the popover. If none is provided, one will be generated.

inputs.name: isOpen
inputs.description: Two-way binding for popover open state

inputs.name: maxWidth
inputs.description: Maximum width of popover body in px, prevents from overextending body by `fillControlMode`

inputs.name: mobile
inputs.description: Whether the popover component should be displayed in mobile mode.

inputs.name: mobileConfig
inputs.description: Config for the popover in mobile mode

inputs.name: noArrow
inputs.description: Whether the arrow should be hidden

inputs.name: placement
inputs.description: Popover placement

inputs.name: placementContainer
inputs.description: Placement of the popover element

inputs.name: preventSpaceKeyScroll
inputs.description: Whether the popover should prevent page scrolling when space key is pressed.

inputs.name: resizable
inputs.description: Whether the popover body is resizable

inputs.name: restoreFocusOnClose
inputs.description: Whether to move the focus after popover is closed to the last focused element before popover was opened.

inputs.name: scrollStrategy
inputs.description: Scroll strategy for the overlay

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: Tooltip for popover

inputs.name: trigger
inputs.description: Reference to popover trigger element

inputs.name: triggers
inputs.description: Popover trigger events configuration

outputs.name: beforeOpen
outputs.description: Event emitted right before the popover is being opened.

outputs.name: isOpenChange
outputs.description: Two-way binding for popover open state

outputs.name: isOpenChange
outputs.description: Event emitted when the state of the isOpen property changes.

methods.name: applyNewPosition
methods.description:
Method called to change position of popover,
recommended to be used only when popover is opened, otherwise change position or cdkPlacement

methods.name: refreshPosition
methods.description: Method called to refresh position of opened popover

methods.name: setIgnoreTriggers
methods.description: Temporary sets the ignoring of the event triggers.

methods.name: triggerKeyDownHandler
methods.description: Handler for alt + arrow down keydown
